/usr/bin/c++ -Wall  -Wsuggest-override -Werror=vla -pthread -O3 -DNDEBUG -s -rdynamic CMakeFiles/utf8_tests.dir/utf8_tests.cpp.o -o utf8_tests  ../common/libcommon.a -pthread -lwx_gtk2u_gl-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_aui-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_adv-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_html-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_core-3.0 -lwx_baseu_net-3.0 -lwx_baseu-3.0 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_stc-3.0 ../common/libgal.a ../bitmaps_png/libbitmaps.a ../polygon/libpolygon.a -lGLEW -lcairo -lpixman-1 -lGL -lGLU -lcurl -lssl -lcrypto -lwx_gtk2u_gl-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_aui-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_adv-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_html-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_core-3.0 -lwx_baseu_net-3.0 -lwx_baseu-3.0 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_stc-3.0
